description: Comprehensive diagnostic manifest — tests all critical interactions across UX Lab shell and sub-projects. Created 2026-03-25 to identify broken features after App.tsx was wiped and restored.

tests.label: All 6 top-level tabs are present and clickable
All 6 projects listed in sidebar
System health indicator shows status
Testing tab renders TestingPanel with manifest list

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'TESTING') { t.click(); return 'clicked TESTING'; } } return 'no TESTING tab'; })()

tests.label: Testing tab lists all manifest files from disk

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'TESTING') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

tests.label: Mockups tab renders mockup gallery

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'MOCKUPS') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

tests.label: Binary Explorer sidebar right-click shows context menu (Rename, Delete, Duplicate, History)

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'FINAL SITE') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('div, span'); for (const el of items) { if (el.textContent && el.textContent.trim() === 'daemon' && el.offsetWidth > 0) { const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('contextmenu', { bubbles: true, clientX: rect.left + 50, clientY: rect.top + 10 })); return 'right-clicked daemon'; } } return 'daemon not found'; })()

tests.label: Binary Explorer Code View calls /api/scillm (not hardcoded localhost:4001)

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'FINAL SITE') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('span, div'); for (const el of items) { if (el.textContent === 'droid' && el.offsetWidth > 0) { el.click(); return 'clicked droid'; } } return 'droid not found'; })()

(() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('button, span'); for (const el of items) { if (el.textContent && el.textContent.includes('Seed Namespaces')) { el.click(); return 'seeded'; } } return 'no seed button'; })()

(() => { const nodes = document.querySelectorAll('[data-node-id], circle, .graph-node'); if (nodes.length > 0) { nodes[0].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true })); return `clicked node (${nodes.length} total)`; } return 'no graph nodes found'; })()

(() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, span'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && (t.textContent.includes('Code') || t.textContent.includes('</>'))) { t.click(); return 'clicked Code tab'; } } return 'no Code tab'; })()
(() => { return document.body.innerText.includes('LLM service unavailable') ? 'FAIL: LLM still unavailable' : 'OK: no LLM error'; })()

tests.label: Binary Explorer shows empty scene with overview on load

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'FINAL SITE') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

tests.label: Seed Namespaces button populates graph with namespace nodes

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'FINAL SITE') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

(() => { const btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (const b of btns) { if (b.textContent && b.textContent.includes('Seed Namespaces')) { b.click(); return 'clicked seed'; } } return 'no seed button'; })()
(() => { const svg = document.querySelector('svg'); if (!svg) return 'no SVG'; const circles = svg.querySelectorAll('circle'); return `${circles.length} circles in graph`; })()

tests.label: SPARTA Explorer loads real data from memory daemon

steps.script: (() => { const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('button, div[role=tab]'); for (const t of tabs) { if (t.textContent && t.textContent.trim() === 'FINAL SITE') { t.click(); return 'clicked'; } } return 'not found'; })()

(() => { const body = document.body.innerText; if (body.includes('Coverage Funnel')) return 'OK: Coverage Funnel present'; if (body.includes('Loading')) return 'WARN: Still loading'; return 'FAIL: No SPARTA content'; })()

tests.label: Hash routing selects correct project

steps.script: (() => { const active = document.querySelector('[class*="bg-tactical"], [style*="accent"]'); return active ? active.textContent?.trim() || 'found active' : 'no active project'; })()

tests.label: Express server /api/health responds

steps.script: (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('/api/health'); const d = await r.json(); return `health: ${JSON.stringify(d).substring(0, 200)}`; } catch(e) { return `FAIL: ${e.message}`; } })()

tests.label: Express server /api/scillm proxy works

steps.script: (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('/api/scillm', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({model:'text',messages:[{role:'user',content:'say ok'}],max_tokens:10}) }); const d = await r.json(); return d.choices ? 'OK: scillm responded' : `FAIL: ${JSON.stringify(d).substring(0,100)}`; } catch(e) { return `FAIL: ${e.message}`; } })()

tests.label: Memory daemon list endpoint works (binary_features collection)

steps.script: (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('/api/memory/list', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({collection:'binary_features',limit:1}) }); const d = await r.json(); return `total: ${d.total}, items: ${d.items?.length || 0}`; } catch(e) { return `FAIL: ${e.message}`; } })()

tests.label: ChatWell/ChatFab component renders

steps.script: (() => { const chatBtns = document.querySelectorAll('button, div'); for (const b of chatBtns) { if (b.textContent && (b.textContent.includes('Chat') || b.textContent.includes('💬') || b.getAttribute('aria-label')?.includes('chat'))) return 'found chat element'; } return 'no chat element found'; })()
